name: codeforge-review
description: + CFP-1117-S4 review-verdict-v4 v4.7 → v4.8 MINOR (findings[].type enum 에 3 DDD finding type literal 추가 — bc_violation / aggregate_violation / ubiquitous_language_drift, ADR-091 §결정 6 enforcement layer 3번째 tier + §결정 7 INV-5 forcing function review-verdict finding 연결, additive only backward-compat) + review-pl-base.md §3 DDD finding type 종합 check table 반영. + CFP-1086 review-verdict-v4 v4.5 → v4.6 MINOR sibling sync (deputy_axis_restructure_self_check_passed field 신설 — ADR-042 Amendment 8 + ADR-086 P7 framework carrier + ADR-068 Amendment 2 chief tie-break ladder scope expansion). codeforge core의 lane-agnostic review subsystem (3 PL + 2 worker + base + 3 checklist). codeforge core 의존. CFP-35 v2 BREAKING — PL self-write (Story §9 + GitHub comment + gate label 직접). ADR-001 lane-agnostic + ADR-008 contract versioning + CFP-29 추출 + CFP-35 ζ arc retrofit + CFP-318 ReviewPL 착수 전 label preflight: bootstrap-labels.sh 자동 실행 (2026-05-10). + CFP-307 DocsAgent 잔존 참조 제거 (2026-05-10). + CFP-391 review-pl-base §3.0~§3.3 debate-protocol-v1 dispatch SOP + review-verdict v4.0→4.1 MINOR bump (anchor_id field, 2026-05-11). + CFP-438 review-verdict v4.1→4.2 MINOR bump (mechanical_self_check_passed optional bool field, ADR-065, 2026-05-13). + CFP-462-followup phase-gate-mergeable workflow sync (CFP-113/123/133/342/499 backport, 2026-05-13). + CFP-528 review-pl-base.md §3 I-5 dimensional empirical grounding mechanical detection rule (ADR-068 Amendment 1 sibling sync) + review-verdict-v4 canonical v4.3 → v4.4 MINOR mirror (dimensional_empirical_self_check_passed + findings[].type "dimensional-empirical-gap") (Wave 2B, 2026-05-13). + CFP-582 ADR-059 Amendment 2 / debate-protocol-v1 v1.2 sibling sync — review-pl-base §11.5 cross-ref block (3 marker pattern verification: [COUNTERARGUMENT] / [ALTERNATIVE_PROPOSED] / [DEBATE_PURPOSE_STATEMENT] + convergence_quality_invariant_final 검증 + Phase 2 mechanical lint cross-ref) (2026-05-13). + CFP-597 review-verdict-v4 canonical v4.4 → v4.5 MINOR bump (marketplace_sync_declared optional bool field, ADR-063 Amendment 1, 2026-05-13). + CFP-698 ADR-014 Amendment 4 + ADR-042 Amendment 7 cross-repo sibling sync — deputy 명칭 rename (OperationalRiskArch → InfraOperationalArch + DataMigrationArch → DataArch) 7 occurrence + DesignReviewPL §8.6 audit gate normative 1-line (pointer-existence vs policy-effectiveness disjoint axis) + arch doc cross-ref (Epic CFP-1026 W2 S4, 2026-05-20). + CFP-1291 — CodeReviewPLAgent.md cross-anchor parity check step 추가 (5 patterns enumeration + finding inline marker, CFP-604 retro F7 follow-up realized minimum-viable Wave 1 declarative; Wave 2 review-verdict-v4 schema field 별 sub-Story carrier ADR-076/082/086 precedent).
